examples: I like your outfit and hairdo!
The Tartar woman doesn't look very happy – perhaps due to what looks like a painful hairdo!
Fellow former teenage heartthrob Selena Gomez put on Vegas-y frocks and an unfortunate Cleopatra-inspired hairdo.
The jokes about him looking like a pint of Guinness, caused by his bleached-blond hairdo, have even abated.
